name: Tianjin Jiuri New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Jiuri New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of photoinitiators and pharmaceutical intermediates. It offers UV photoinitiators, such as free radical type, polymeric type, cationic type, and inhibitor photoinitiators. The company also provides reactive monomers, oligomers, and reactive amine synergists; fine chemicals; and UV absorbers. In addition, it offers solutions, such as low-odor, non-yellowing, benzene-free, polymeric, low emission, and water-based UV formulations, as well as through-curing formulations. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Tianjin, China.
